label: Configure starting pawns
description: Configuration page for selecting starting pawns. Controls pawn count, how many candidates are generated, allowed developmental stages, and required skills.

pawnCount.label: Pawn count
pawnCount.description: Number of pawns the player starts with. Defaults to 3.

allowedDevelopmentalStages.label: Allowed developmental stages
allowedDevelopmentalStages.description: Developmental stages allowed for generated starting pawns.

requiredSkills.label: Required skills
requiredSkills.description: SkillDefs that starting pawn candidates must have at a usable level.
